entries.title: St. Jerome, Commentary on Daniel, CHAPTER THIRTEEN on daniel 13:42
entries.excerpt: Verse 42. "But Susanna cried out with a great voice..." Her voice was rendered the clearer because of the emotion of her heart, the honest sincerity of her avowal, and the uprightness of her conscience. And so, although men would not listen to it, her outcry to God was great.
